title: Sariska Tiger Reserve
tagline: Sariska Tiger Reserve — wildlife reserve of Rajasthan

overview.short: Sariska Tiger Reserve is a tiger reserve in Alwar district of Rajasthan, India.
overview.description: Sariska Tiger Reserve is a tiger reserve in Alwar district of Rajasthan, India. It stretches over 1,203.34 km2 (464.61 sq mi) including a core area of 881 km2 (340 sq mi) and a buffer zone 322.23 km2 (124.41 sq mi). Its habitat consists of scrub-thorn arid forests, dry deciduous forests, grasslands, and rocky hills. The Sariska forest area was first recognized as a wildlife reserve in 1955.

topPlaces.name: Kasba Dehra
topPlaces.description: Kasba Dehra is a Kasba (Town) in Alwar district in Rajasthan, India.

topPlaces.name: Kankwadi
topPlaces.description: Kankwadi or Kankwari is the site of Kankwadi fort and village, located in the Sariska Tiger Reserve in Alwar district. The fort was founded by Jai Singh II as a famine work.

items.note: Kasba Dehra is a Kasba (Town) in Alwar district in Rajasthan, India.
Kankwadi or Kankwari is the site of Kankwadi fort and village, located in the Sariska Tiger Reserve in Alwar district. The fort was founded by Jai Singh II as a famine work.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sariska Tiger Reserve?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sariska Tiger Reserve is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sariska Tiger Reserve?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jaipur International Airport (83 km) and the nearest railway station is Jaipur Junction (78 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sariska Tiger Reserve?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sariska Tiger Reserve at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sariska Tiger Reserve?
faq.a: Stays in Sariska Tiger Reserve start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sariska Tiger Reserve?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kasba Dehra, Kankwadi.
